code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_line()
  match line
  when Some(s)
    let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
    mut sum = 0
    mut i = 0
    mut stop = false
    let n = parts.len()
    while i < n and not stop
      match parts.get(i)
      when Some(tok)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          if v < 0
            stop = true
          else
            sum = sum + v
            i = i + 1
          end
        when None
          i = i + 1
        end
      when None
        stop = true
      end
    end
    println("partial=#{sum}")
  when None
    println("partial=0")
  end
end
